en: I want a love like in a dating sim
I want to kiss you out of nowhere
I want to dive under the covers and wait for morning
I want a love like in a dating sim
I want to crash into you at a corner,
and then reunite in the classroom… yay
(want, want, want, wanna…)
Hello — you, all alone again today,
grinning away in front of your monitor,
hello — just a little — I'm right here,
an actual flesh-and-blood me, and you're being so rude
A formidable rival — a 2D idol,
eyes all Kira-Kira, cowlick always Bin-Bin,
meanwhile I get by passably at most,
nothing eye-catching about me in real life
Ah, ah — even I…
I want a love like in a dating sim
I want to kiss you out of nowhere
I want to dive under the covers and wait for morning
I want a love like in a dating sim
I want to crash into you at a corner,
and then reunite in the classroom…
Every girl is the main heroine, you know
Hello — if I were your childhood friend,
I'd come wake you up every morning with a fist
hello — if only I were a little more petite,
I'd play little sister with an upward glance
A lackluster My Life, my room's a mess too,
I can't manage email, or calls, or messages
even if I search for your name,
it's just same-name strangers, a sprint of look-alikes…
Ah, ah — with you…
I want a love like in a dating sim
I want to slap you over a misunderstanding
and then make up safe and sound,
and eat a parfait
I want a love like in a dating sim
your parents overseas, the house to ourselves,
I want to cling to you on a thundering night
Every girl is the main heroine…
but what matters most of all
is the part after the ending
Ah, ah — with you…
I want a love like in a dating sim
I want to slap you over a misunderstanding
and then make up safe and sound,
and eat a parfait
I want a love like in a dating sim
your parents overseas, the house to ourselves,
I want to cling to you on a thundering night
The world of the two of us — completion rate: infinite
I want a love like in a dating sim

jp: 好きよ　好きよ　今まで会った誰よりずっと
好きよ　好きよ　デモサヨナラ
「おめでとう」　「ありがとう」　「また会おうね」　「元気でね」
今日で最後の制服が　花束に囲まれてる
友達とふざけてたら　あなたと目が合ったんだ
ボタンの取れた制服が　青空に似合っていた
この街を離れるあなたは無邪気に
何度も言うの「離れていても大丈夫だよ」
好きよ　好きよ　今まで会った誰よりずっと
好きよ　好きよ　あの日のまま
好きよ　好きよ　ずっとあなたのそばにいたいけど
好きよ　好きよ　デモサヨナラ
ききわけの良い子なんて　今はなれそうにないの
困ったようなあなたの顔も　やっぱり素敵だよ
２人別々の想い出が増えてく
あなたは言うの「僕らはきっと強くなれるよ」
目に見えないもの　手に触れないもの
あなたは信じられるの？「信じるよ」
ごめんね　ごめんね　一人置き去りにされてるようで
寂しい　寂しいの　いつか私を迎えに来てね
好きよ　好きよ　今まで会った誰よりずっと
好きよ　好きよ　これからもずっと
好きよ　好きよ　あきらめるわけにはいかないの
好きよ　好きよ　乗り越えてみせるから
en: I love you, love you, more than anyone I've ever met
I love you, love you — but goodbye
"Congratulations" — "Thank you" — "Let's meet again" — "Take care"
The uniform I'm wearing for the last day is surrounded by bouquets
I was goofing around with friends when my eyes met yours
Your uniform with its button torn off looked just right against the blue sky
Innocent as ever, you — the one leaving this town —
keep saying, over and over, "We'll be fine even apart"
I love you, love you, more than anyone I've ever met
I love you, love you — unchanged from that day
I love you, love you — I want to stay by your side forever, but
I love you, love you — but goodbye
A good, obedient girl — that's not something I can be right now
Even the troubled look on your face is, after all, wonderful
The two of us are piling up separate memories
and you say, "We're sure to grow stronger"
Things you can't see, things you can't touch —
can you believe in them? "I believe"
I'm sorry, I'm sorry — I feel like I'm being left behind all alone
I'm lonely, so lonely — someday, come and meet me, won't you
I love you, love you, more than anyone I've ever met
I love you, love you, and from here on, forever
I love you, love you — I can't just give up on this
I love you, love you — I'll rise above it, you'll see
